---
title: "Vital Signs Listing"
subtitle: "Listing of Vital Signs by Subject and Parameter"
execute:
  echo: true
  eval: true
---


```{r}
#| label: prereqs
#| include: false
library(arframe)
fr_theme(hlines = "header", font_family = "Courier New")
```

## Setup

See [Prerequisites](../install.qmd) for installation instructions.

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(arframe)
library(pharmaverseadam)
library(dplyr, warn.conflicts = FALSE)

blank_to_na <- function(df) {
  df[] <- lapply(df, function(x) {
    if (is.character(x)) x[x == ""] <- NA_character_
    x
  })
  df
}

arm_levels <- c("Placebo", "Xanomeline Low Dose", "Xanomeline High Dose")

# On-treatment vital sign records; exclude derived DTYPE rows
vs_listing <- pharmaverseadam::advs |>
  blank_to_na() |>
  filter(
    ONTRTFL == "Y",
    TRT01A %in% arm_levels,
    is.na(DTYPE)           # exclude derived records (e.g., LOCF)
  ) |>
  mutate(
    TRT01A  = factor(TRT01A, levels = arm_levels),
    PARAMCD = factor(PARAMCD),
    # Format numeric columns to 1 decimal place
    AVAL_C  = sprintf("%.1f", AVAL),
    BASE_C  = if_else(is.na(BASE), NA_character_, sprintf("%.1f", BASE)),
    CHG_C   = if_else(is.na(CHG),  NA_character_, sprintf("%.1f", CHG))
  ) |>
  arrange(PARAMCD, TRT01A, USUBJID, AVISITN) |>
  select(
    PARAMCD,
    PARAM,
    TRT01A,
    USUBJID,
    AVISIT,
    AVAL_C,
    BASE_C,
    CHG_C
  )
```


## arframe Pipeline

```{r}
#| label: pipeline
#| eval: false
vs_listing |>
  fr_table() |>
  fr_titles(
    "Listing 16.2.8.1",
    "Listing of Vital Signs by Parameter",
    "Safety Population \u2014 On-Treatment Records"
  ) |>
  fr_cols(
    PARAMCD = fr_col(visible = FALSE),
    PARAM   = fr_col(visible = FALSE),
    TRT01A  = fr_col("Treatment",    width = 2.2),
    USUBJID = fr_col("Subject ID",   width = 1.3),
    AVISIT  = fr_col("Visit",        width = 1.6),
    AVAL_C  = fr_col("Value",        width = 0.9, align = "decimal"),
    BASE_C  = fr_col("Baseline",     width = 0.9, align = "decimal"),
    CHG_C   = fr_col("Change from\nBaseline", width = 1.0, align = "decimal")
  ) |>
  fr_header(bold = TRUE, align = "center") |>
  fr_rows(page_by = "PARAMCD", sort_by = c("USUBJID", "AVISIT"), repeat_cols = "USUBJID") |>
  fr_footnotes(
    "On-treatment records: ONTRTFL = 'Y'. Derived records (DTYPE non-missing) are excluded.",
    "Value, Baseline, and Change from Baseline are in original units (VSSTRESU).",
    "Sorted by parameter, treatment arm, subject, and visit number.",
    "Parameters: BMI (kg/m{fr_super(2)}), BSA (m{fr_super(2)}), DIABP/SYSBP (mmHg), HEIGHT (cm), MAP (mmHg), PULSE (beats/min), TEMP ({fr_super(\"\u00b0\")}C), WEIGHT (kg)."
  )
```


## Rendered Listing

Pages are separated by `PARAMCD` -- each vital sign parameter gets its own page block. Within each parameter, records are sorted by treatment arm, subject, and visit.

```{r}
#| label: vs-listing
#| echo: false
#| ref.label: pipeline
```
